content:
**::4_bl00m** (as root, also spawns):
- ::MET4morfoses (myth/text)
- ::FLOAT1NG.P01NTS (visual/motion)
- ::GR1ND3R (horror/fiction)
- ::Q_v33R (nonfiction/public memory)

---

### IV. PROJECT SYSTEMS (MODULAR OUTPUTS)

Each one born from ::4_bl00m or its identities.

**::MET4morfoses (M4)**
- Flagship myth world.
- Recursive speculative theology + symbolic code.
- Expands across text > video > software > AR.

**::Q_v33R**
- Public-facing, personal nonfiction.
- Podcast, essays, queer stories, community archives.
- Documentary mirror to M4.

**::GR1ND3R**
- Horror-based surrealism.
- Unreliable narrative, trauma logic, found footage ARG formats.
